validated_commands.test: python3 -m uv run pytest tests/unit tests/test_console.py -x -q
validated_commands.test_full: python3 -m uv run pytest tests/unit tests/test_console.py -x -q
validated_commands.format: python3 -m uv run black . && python3 -m uv run isort .
validated_commands.install_dev: pip install uv --break-system-packages && python3 -m uv sync --extra dev
validated_commands.notes: uv is not on PATH in CI; use 'pip install uv --break-system-packages' then 'python3 -m uv'. RegistryIntegration is lazily imported in mcp.py function bodies; patch at apm_cli.registry.integration.RegistryIntegration. Avoid --cov flag: causes PyYAML global state corruption. APMPackage.from_apm_yml requires 'version' field in apm.yml. Rich imports in deps/cli.py are all lazy (inside function bodies) - patch via sys.modules removal or apm_cli.core.scope.get_apm_dir for scope. use _force_rich_fallback() pattern to stub out rich via sys.modules for text-fallback testing.

coverage_baseline.notes: All 3419 tests pass as of 2026-04-02. +20 new deps list/tree/info tests in this run (was 3399).

yaml_pollution_note: Running tests with --cov causes PyYAML global state corruption from some earlier test. Tests pass without --cov.
ansi_strip_note: 7 ANSI failures fully resolved as of 2026-03-16. No longer a concern.
config_bug_note: set_auto_integrate/get_auto_integrate were missing from apm_cli/config.py - fixed in PR 2026-03-19.
lockfile_format_note: Lockfile is apm.lock.yaml (LOCKFILE_NAME constant). Legacy apm.lock read via get_lockfile_path fallback. Tests should write apm.lock.yaml.
lazy_import_note: RegistryIntegration imported lazily inside mcp.py function bodies. Must patch 'apm_cli.registry.integration.RegistryIntegration', not 'apm_cli.commands.mcp.RegistryIntegration'.
compile_cli_note: compile/cli.py display helpers patch target is 'apm_cli.commands.compile.cli._get_console' (not _helpers). _get_console is imported into the module namespace.
deps_cli_note: All imports in deps/cli.py (rich, scope, lockfile) are lazy (inside function bodies). Patch at source module (e.g. apm_cli.core.scope.get_apm_dir). For Rich fallback testing, use sys.modules removal pattern. APMPackage.from_apm_yml requires 'version' field.

testing_backlog.notes: PR created 2026-04-02. 20 tests. Branch: test-assist/deps-list-tree-info-23878586888. clean/update already had tests.
list/tree/info now covered. _show_scope_deps internals partially tested. Main update() orchestration still complex.
2131 lines but already 1742 lines of tests across 5 test files. Lower priority.
Security-critical code - validate_path_segments and ensure_path_within. Worth verifying coverage.
Core integration infrastructure - partition_managed_files, collision detection, etc.
